mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_ITEM , AP.VENDOR_CD AS RECV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_USER_NM , PG.VOTE_CNT , SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_END_DATETIME ,getSupBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, PG.VOTE_CNT, AP.VENDOR_CD, 'CD') AS BID_STATUS , HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(VO.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDVO VO WHERE VO.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND VO.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND VO.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND VO.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = PG.VOTE_CNT AND VO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS SEND_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(VO.VENDOR_CD) FROM STOCBDVO VO WHERE VO.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND VO.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND VO.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND VO.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND VO.VOTE_CNT = PG.VOTE_CNT AND VO.VENDOR_CD = AP.VENDOR_CD AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE (CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE2 = 'TD' THEN (CASE WHEN AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG = '600' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) ELSE 'Y' END) END) AS SEND_POSSIBLE_FLAG ,(SELECT V.VOTE_CNT FROM ( SELECT VOTE_CNT , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY PG.GATE_CD, PG.BUYER_CD, PG.BID_NUM, PG.BID_CNT ORDER BY PG.MOD_DATE DESC) AS RANK FROM STOCBDPG PG WHERE PG.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND PG.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND PG.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND PG.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT) V WHERE V.RANK = 1) AS PRECENT_VOTE -- 2021.07.02 : 입찰서 제출기한 안내 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.BID_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_BID_BATCH_SEND' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.BID_NUM '@@' HD.BID_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , 'STOCBDHD' AS CONT_TBL_ID FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '2303', '2330', '2500', '9999') AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') != '600' AND (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') != '600') AND PG.BID_END_DATE PG.BID_END_TIME >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND PG.BID_END_DATE PG.BID_END_TIME <= TO_CHAR((SYSDATE + (2/24) + (10/(24 * 60))), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND getSupBidProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, PG.VOTE_CNT, AP.VENDOR_CD, 'CD') IN ('100', '200') ) A
WHERE (CASE WHEN (TO_NUMBER(A.ORI_BID_STATUS) < 2400 OR A.ORI_BID_STATUS = '2550') THEN '1' WHEN (A.ORI_BID_STATUS = '2410' AND (SELECT MAX((SV.BID_STATUS, '100')) FROM STOCBDVO SV WHERE SV.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND SV.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND SV.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND SV.BID_CNT = A.BID_CNT AND SV.VENDOR_CD = A.RECV_USER_ID AND SV.DEL_FLAG = '0') = '200' AND A.VOTE_CNT <= PRECENT_VOTE) THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) = '1' AND A.SEND_FLAG = 'N' AND A.SEND_POSSIBLE_FLAG = 'Y'

SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_ITEM , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_END_DATETIME , SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_BEGIN_DATETIME , HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS , HD.BID_USER_ID AS RECV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_USER_NM -- 2021.07.02 : 입찰서 제출기한 안내 SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.BID_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_BID_BATCH_CLOSE' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.BID_NUM '@@' HD.BID_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , 'STOCBDHD' AS CONT_TBL_ID FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.CONT_TYPE2 NOT IN ('TD') AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '2303', '2330', '9999') AND TO_NUMBER(HD.BID_STATUS) < 2350 AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND HD.APP_END_DATE HD.APP_END_TIME >= TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND PG.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(P.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT) AND PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME <= TO_CHAR((SYSDATE + (2/24) + (10/(24 * 60))), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.RFX_NUM , HD.RFX_CNT , HD.RFX_SUBJECT ,(HD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RFX_START_DATE ,(HD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RFX_END_DATE , HD.CTRL_USER_ID AS RECV_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS RECV_USER_NM ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.CTRL_USER_ID) AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , HD.CTRL_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_RFX_BATCH_REQ' '@@' HD.GATE_CD '@@' HD.BUYER_CD '@@' HD.RFX_NUM '@@' HD.RFX_CNT AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE , 'STOCRQHD' AS CONT_TBL_ID FROM STOCRQHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.PROGRESS_CD = '2300' -- 작성중 AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' -- 결재승인 AND (HD.SEND_YN, '0') = '0' AND TO_CHAR (HD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') <= TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_CHAR (HD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') >= TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'
